item.title: Reduce double jq parsing — extract all needed fields in one pass
item.intent: Eliminate the pattern of extracting a jq projection then re-parsing the result for individual fields, by extracting all needed fields in a single jq pass using @base64 or multi-output
steps: Identify all places where jq output is captured then re-parsed with another jq call
Consolidate into single jq calls that extract all needed fields at once
Use read or IFS-based splitting for multiple field extraction
acceptanceCriteria: No instance of echo item_json pipe jq for single field extraction after a prior jq projection
